name: FixYourCredit.io – Second Chance Credit Restoration - Affordable DIY Credit Repair For $39.99
description_short: DIY credit repair platform allowing users to create and dispute negative items on their credit reports for $39.99/month, with automated dispute letter generation.
description_long:
Second Chance Credit Restoration is a self-service credit repair platform positioned as an affordable alternative to traditional credit repair agencies. The company targets consumers who want to dispute errors and negative accounts on their own credit reports without paying for professional representation. Founded on the premise that credit repair doesn't require expensive third-party services, the platform emphasizes speed and simplicity in the dispute process.

The core offering is a subscription-based service priced at $39.99 monthly that includes access to all three major credit bureau reports (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) and automated dispute letter generation software. Users can identify negative accounts—including late payments, collections, charge-offs, and medical debt—and create customized dispute letters within minutes. The platform provides options for users to either print and mail letters themselves or pay a third-party fee for professional printing and mailing. Dispute letters can be downloaded, emailed, or accessed anytime through the client portal.

What distinguishes FixYourCredit.io is its focus on the DIY model with minimal friction. The software automatically identifies negative accounts and recommends dispute strategies based on account type and details. The 30-day dispute cycle aligns with Fair Credit Reporting Act timelines, allowing users to submit new batches of disputes monthly. Service availability across all 50 states removes geographic barriers. The pricing is straightforward with no hidden fees beyond the monthly subscription, and users retain full control over which accounts to dispute.

However, potential users should understand the limitations. Credit repair timelines are inherently long—each dispute cycle takes 30 days minimum, and results depend on whether bureaus find violations. The company makes no promises about outcome rates or removal success. This model works best for consumers with clear errors or willing to undertake sustained monthly dispute efforts. For those wanting hands-off representation or guaranteed results, traditional credit repair agencies or non-profit credit counseling may be more appropriate. The responsibility for success rests entirely on user persistence and dispute validity.

In the broader ecosystem of credit repair services, consumers have multiple paths to improving their credit. Professional credit repair companies can dispute inaccurate items with all three bureaus, while credit monitoring services provide ongoing alerts about changes to your reports. For those building credit from scratch, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured approaches. Consumers dealing with overwhelming debt may benefit from debt consolidation loans to simplify payments, or credit counseling through nonprofit agencies for personalized budgeting guidance. Consumers who successfully repair their credit often find better rates on installment loans, secured credit cards, and other financial products.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Low fixed price of $39.99/month with no per-dispute fees or hidden charges
Automated software identifies negative accounts and recommends dispute options by account type
Dispute letters generated and downloaded in under 5 minutes per the website
Access to all three major credit bureaus (Equifax, Experian, TransUnion) in one service
Option to mail letters yourself or pay small fee for third-party printing/mailing
Available in all 50 states with no geographic restrictions
Aligned with 30-day Fair Credit Reporting Act review cycles, allowing monthly dispute batches
cons: No guarantee of removal success—outcomes depend entirely on bureau investigation findings
Requires sustained user effort over months; credit repair is inherently slow (minimum 30 days per cycle)
Users must manage and track their own disputes; no white-glove service or case management
Limited information on success rates or average timelines for account removal
Does not address root causes like unpaid debt or legitimate negative items that cannot be legally removed
best_for: Budget-conscious consumers with clear errors on credit reports who are willing to handle their own disputes
Self-directed individuals comfortable with technology and willing to mail letters or pay small printing fees
People in the early stages of credit repair who want to start with inexpensive DIY efforts before hiring professionals
diagnosis: FixYourCredit.io is best for budget-minded consumers with identified credit report errors who are willing to spend 10-15 minutes monthly managing their own disputes over a 3-6+ month timeline. The main caveat is that this DIY approach offers no guarantee of results—success depends on dispute validity and bureau responsiveness, and the service provides no professional advocacy if disputes are denied. Users must accept full responsibility for their credit repair outcomes.
services: Three-bureau credit report access and monitoring
Automated negative account identification and flagging
AI-recommended dispute strategies by account type (late payments, collections, charge-offs, medical debt)
DIY dispute letter generation and customization
Letter download and email delivery through client portal
Optional third-party printing and mailing service
Self-serve letter printing and mailing option
Monthly dispute cycle management and resubmission capability
Coverage of all three major credit bureaus simultaneously
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
meta_description: DIY credit repair platform for creating and disputing negative items on credit reports for $39.99/month.
